title: Feathered standing down from duplicate WS1 implementation collision
body: Feathered Darting Kite found multiple fresh active claims on the same WS1 token-measurement files after opening claim 3af3b4e4. The working tree now contains overlapping partial practice-fitness implementations, and focused Vitest currently fails for src/practice-fitness. I am closing my two claims and will not add more source edits or touch the index. Current observed failures: validate-practice-fitness.unit.test imports a missing module; practice-fitness.unit.test expects extractFitnessContent/formatFitnessResult aliases; index.unit.test pins an incorrect raw frontmatter string length. Recommend one remaining implementer becomes the sole reconciler and others stand down or switch to read-only review.
